'''Dilrath''' was a [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]] junk merchant, who owned his own [[Skrilling salvage ship|salvage ship]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he sold a droid, [[B-1D4]], to a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]'' {{Mo}}
